creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
Gentlemen!

As posted there are some minor issues with the port:

   1. PORTVERSION and DISTVERSION can not be co-exist in the same
      Makefile -- if DISTVERSION is present, PORTVERSION is produced
      automatically.
   2. When the authors produce a new release (1.0-Chipmunk-15, for
      example), the PORTVERSION ought to go up... It should be something
      like 1.0.15. However, if we set the DISTVERSION to 1.0-Chipmunk-14
      now, then the automatically-created PORTVERSION will be 1.0.c.14.
      This would've been fine, if we knew, the next release is not going
      to be 1.0-Baboon-15, which would send us backwards (1.0.b.15 <
      1.0.c.14)... Therefor, I propose we ignore the release mascot and
      force PORTVERSION to 1.0.14 now.
   3. The head of the Makefile contains a typo (``Date create''), that
      portlint does not like.
   4. The port can (and thus should) be built in parallel.

I'm ready to commit this with the attached modification to the Makefile. 
(Sorry, Philip -- I started looking at it before noticing, that you are 
interested too...) Yours,

    -mi
